query:
You are working on the pinterest/ktlint repository.
The codebase is at version 0.50 (commit: e69ac9eb).

## Issue to Resolve

Indent IS_EXPRESSION and PREFIX_EXPRESSION
A multiline IS_EXPRESSION like below:
```
fun foo(any: Any) = any is
        Foo
```
is formatted by ktlint `0.49.x` to:
```
fun foo(any: Any) =
    any is
    Foo
```
while below was expected:
```
fun foo(any: Any) =
    any is
        Foo
```

Same for PREFIX_EXPRESSION:
```
fun foo(any: Int) = ++
    42
```

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `CHANGELOG.md`
- `ktlint-ruleset-standard/src/main/kotlin/com/pinterest/ktlint/ruleset/standard/rules/IndentationRule.kt`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

Focus on:
- Understanding the root cause of the issue
- Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem
- Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality

 176â†’    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(

 184â†’                .nextLeaf()

 306â†’            node.elementType in CHAINABLE_EXPRESSION -> {

 377â†’    private fun ASTNode.isPartOfClassWithAMultilinePrimaryConstructor() =
 378â†’        parent { it.elementType == CLASS }
 379â†’            ?.findChildByType(PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR)

 492â†’    private fun ASTNode.calculateIndentOfFunctionLiteralParameters() =
 493â†’        if (isFirstParameterOfFunctionLiteralPrecededByNewLine()) {
 494â†’            // val fieldExample =
 495â†’            //      LongNameClass {
 496â†’            //              paramA,
 497â†’            //              paramB,
 498â†’            //              paramC ->
 499â†’            //          ClassB(paramA, paramB, paramC)
 500â†’            //      }
 501â†’            indentConfig.indent.repeat(2)
 502â†’        } else {
 503â†’            // Allow default IntelliJ IDEA formatting:
 504â†’            // val fieldExample =
 505â†’            //     LongNameClass { paramA,
 506â†’            //                     paramB,
 507â†’            //                     paramC ->
 508â†’            //         ClassB(paramA, paramB, paramC)
 509â†’            //     }
 510â†’            // val fieldExample =
 511â†’            //     someFunction(
 512â†’            //         1,
 513â†’            //         2,
 514â†’            //     ) { paramA,
 515â†’            //         paramB,
 516â†’            //         paramC ->
 517â†’            //         ClassB(paramA, paramB, paramC)
 518â†’            //     }
 519â†’            this
 520â†’                .takeIf { it.isPartOf(CALL_EXPRESSION) }
 521â†’                ?.treeParent
 522â†’                ?.leaves(false)
 523â†’                ?.takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
 524â†’                ?.sumOf { it.textLength }
 525â†’                ?.plus(2) // need to add spaces to compensate for "{ "
 526â†’                ?.let { length -> " ".repeat(length) }
 527â†’                ?: indentConfig.indent.repeat(2)
 528â†’        }

 577â†’            node.prevSibling { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() } == null &&

 580â†’            nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(

 584â†’        } else {

 625â†’    private fun visitClass(node: ASTNode) {

 627â†’        var nextToAstNode: ASTNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 628â†’        node

 630â†’            ?.let { where ->
 631â†’                val typeConstraintList =
 632â†’                    requireNotNull(

 638â†’                nextToAstNode =

 640â†’                        fromAstNode = where.getPrecedingLeadingCommentsAndWhitespaces(),
 641â†’                        toAstNode = typeConstraintList.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),

 644â†’
 645â†’        val primaryConstructor = node.findChildByType(PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR)
 646â†’        val containsConstructorKeyword = primaryConstructor?.findChildByType(CONSTRUCTOR_KEYWORD) != null
 647â†’        if (codeStyle == ktlint_official && primaryConstructor != null && containsConstructorKeyword) {
 648â†’            // Contrary to the default IntelliJ IDEA formatter, ident both constructor and super type list as follows:
 649â†’            //     class Foo
 650â†’            //        @Bar1 @Bar2
 651â†’            //        constructor(
 652â†’            //            foo1: Foo1,
 653â†’            //            foo2: Foo2,
 654â†’            //        ) : Foobar1(
 655â†’            //                "foobar1",
 656â†’            //                "foobar2",
 657â†’            //            ),
 658â†’            //            FooBar2,
 659â†’            val superTypeList = node.findChildByType(SUPER_TYPE_LIST)
 660â†’            nextToAstNode =
 661â†’                startIndentContext(
 662â†’                    fromAstNode = primaryConstructor.getPrecedingLeadingCommentsAndWhitespaces(),
 663â†’                    toAstNode =
 664â†’                        superTypeList
 665â†’                            ?.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 666â†’                            ?: nextToAstNode,
 667â†’                ).prevCodeLeaf()
 668â†’
 669â†’            superTypeList
 670â†’                ?.findChildByType(COMMA)

 680â†’                    //             bar1,
 681â†’                    //             bar2
 682â†’                    //         ),
 683â†’                    //         BarFoo1
 684â†’                    val prevCodeLeaf =
 685â†’                        startIndentContext(
 686â†’                            fromAstNode = comma,

 688â†’                            childIndent = indentConfig.indent.repeat(2),
 689â†’                        ).prevCodeLeaf()

 694â†’                }
 695â†’        } else {
 696â†’            node
 697â†’                .findChildByType(SUPER_TYPE_LIST)
 698â†’                ?.let { superTypeList ->
 699â†’                    nextToAstNode =

 701â†’                            fromAstNode = superTypeList.getPrecedingLeadingCommentsAndWhitespaces(),
 702â†’                            toAstNode = superTypeList.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),

 707â†’        // Leading annotations and comments should be indented at same level as class itself

1138â†’    private fun ASTNode.normalizedIndent(emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit): String {
1139â†’        val nodeIndent = text.substringAfterLast("\n")
1140â†’        return when (indentConfig.indentStyle) {
1141â†’            SPACE -> {
1142â†’                if ('\t' in nodeIndent) {
1143â†’                    emit(
1144â†’                        startOffset + text.length - nodeIndent.length,
1145â†’                        "Unexpected tab character(s)",
1146â†’                        true,
1147â†’                    )
1148â†’                    indentConfig.toNormalizedIndent(nodeIndent)
1149â†’                } else {
1150â†’                    nodeIndent
1151â†’                }
1152â†’            }
1153â†’
1154â†’            TAB -> {

1156â†’                val nodeIndentWithoutAcceptableTrailingSpaces = nodeIndent.removeSuffix(acceptableTrailingSpaces)
1157â†’                if (' ' in nodeIndentWithoutAcceptableTrailingSpaces) {

1160â†’                        "Unexpected space character(s)",
1161â†’                        true,
1162â†’                    )
1163â†’                    indentConfig

1165â†’                        .plus(acceptableTrailingSpaces)
1166â†’                } else {
1167â†’                    nodeIndent
1168â†’                }
1169â†’            }

1232â†’    private data class IndentContext(

1375â†’                                    it.isClosingQuote()
1376â†’                            )

1394â†’                                )

1396â†’                                    (it.firstChildNode as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(

1398â†’                                    )

1416â†’                                        )
1417â†’                                    }
1418â†’                                }

content.text:
Now I understand the structure. I need to:
1. Add imports for IS_EXPRESSION and PREFIX_EXPRESSION
2. Add handling for these expression types in the beforeVisitChildNodes method

Looking at the issue, the problem is that when IS_EXPRESSION or PREFIX_EXPRESSION is multiline, the right-hand side (the type or operand) should be indented with an additional level. This is similar to how BINARY_EXPRESSION works.

Let me implement the fix:

content.text:
Perfect! The `startIndentContext` method creates an indent context with a default `childIndent` of `indentConfig.indent` (which is typically 4 spaces). This means that when we call `startIndentContext(node)` for IS_EXPRESSION or PREFIX_EXPRESSION, it will indent the children (the right-hand side) by one additional level.

 129â†’public class IndentationRule :
 130â†’    StandardRule(
 131â†’        id = "indent",
 132â†’        visitorModifiers =
 133â†’            setOf(
 134â†’                VisitorModifier.RunAsLateAsPossible,
 135â†’                VisitorModifier.RunAfterRule(
 136â†’                    ruleId = FUNCTION_SIGNATURE_RULE_ID,
 137â†’                    mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
 138â†’                ),
 139â†’                VisitorModifier.RunAfterRule(
 140â†’                    ruleId = TRAILING_COMMA_ON_CALL_SITE_RULE_ID,
 141â†’                    mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
 142â†’                ),
 143â†’                VisitorModifier.RunAfterRule(
 144â†’                    ruleId = TRAILING_COMMA_ON_DECLARATION_SITE_RULE_ID,
 145â†’                    mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
 146â†’                ),
 147â†’            ),
 148â†’        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 149â†’            setOf(
 150â†’                CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 151â†’                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 152â†’                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 153â†’            ),
 154â†’    ) {
 155â†’    private var codeStyle = CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY.defaultValue
 156â†’    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 157â†’
 158â†’    private var line = 1
 159â†’
 160â†’    private val indentContextStack: Deque<IndentContext> = LinkedList()
 161â†’
 162â†’    private lateinit var stringTemplateIndenter: StringTemplateIndenter
 163â†’
 164â†’    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 165â†’        codeStyle = editorConfig[CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY]
 166â†’        indentConfig =
 167â†’            IndentConfig(
 168â†’                indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 169â†’                tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 170â†’            )
 171â†’        if (indentConfig.disabled) {
 172â†’            stopTraversalOfAST()
 173â†’        }
 174â†’    }

 176â†’    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 177â†’        node: ASTNode,
 178â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 179â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 180â†’    ) {
 181â†’        if (node.isRoot()) {
 182â†’            // File should not start with a whitespace
 183â†’            node
 184â†’                .nextLeaf()
 185â†’                ?.takeIf { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
 186â†’                ?.let { whitespaceWithoutNewline ->
 187â†’                    emit(node.startOffset, "Unexpected indentation", true)
 188â†’                    if (autoCorrect) {
 189â†’                        whitespaceWithoutNewline.treeParent.removeChild(whitespaceWithoutNewline)
 190â†’                    }
 191â†’                }
 192â†’            indentContextStack.addLast(startNoIndentZone(node))
 193â†’        }
 194â†’
 195â†’        when {
 196â†’            node.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() -> {
 197â†’                line++
 198â†’                if (indentContextStack.peekLast()?.activated == false) {
 199â†’                    val lastIndentContext = indentContextStack.removeLast()
 200â†’                    indentContextStack.addLast(
 201â†’                        lastIndentContext.copy(activated = true),
 202â†’                    )
 203â†’                }
 204â†’                visitNewLineIndentation(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 205â†’            }
 206â†’
 207â†’            node.elementType == CLASS_BODY ||
 208â†’                node.elementType == CONTEXT_RECEIVER_LIST ||
 209â†’                node.elementType == LONG_STRING_TEMPLATE_ENTRY ||
 210â†’                node.elementType == STRING_TEMPLATE ||
 211â†’                node.elementType == VALUE_ARGUMENT_LIST ->
 212â†’                startIndentContext(
 213â†’                    fromAstNode = node,
 214â†’                    lastChildIndent = "",
 215â†’                )
 216â†’
 217â†’            node.elementType == SUPER_TYPE_CALL_ENTRY -> {
 218â†’                if (codeStyle == ktlint_official && node.isPartOfClassWithAMultilinePrimaryConstructor()) {
 219â†’                    // Contrary to the default IntelliJ IDEA formatter, indent the super type call entry so that it looks better in case it
 220â†’                    // is followed by another super type:
 221â†’                    //      class Foo(
 222â†’                    //          val bar1: Bar,
 223â†’                    //          val bar2: Bar,
 224â†’                    //      ) : FooBar(
 225â†’                    //              bar1,
 226â†’                    //              bar2
 227â†’                    //          ),
 228â†’                    //          BarFoo,
 229â†’                    startIndentContext(
 230â†’                        fromAstNode = node,
 231â†’                        childIndent = indentConfig.indent,
 232â†’                        activated = true,
 233â†’                    )
 234â†’                } else {
 235â†’                    startIndentContext(
 236â†’                        fromAstNode = node,
 237â†’                        lastChildIndent = "",
 238â†’                    )
 239â†’                }
 240â†’            }
 241â†’
 242â†’            node.elementType == VALUE_ARGUMENT ->
 243â†’                visitValueArgument(node)
 244â†’
 245â†’            node.elementType == SECONDARY_CONSTRUCTOR ->
 246â†’                visitSecondaryConstructor(node)
 247â†’
 248â†’            node.elementType == PARENTHESIZED ->
 249â†’                if (codeStyle == ktlint_official) {
 250â†’                    // Contrary to the IntelliJ IDEA default formatter, do not indent the closing RPAR
 251â†’                    startIndentContext(
 252â†’                        fromAstNode = node,
 253â†’                        lastChildIndent = "",
 254â†’                    )
 255â†’                } else if (node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != IF) {
 256â†’                    startIndentContext(node)
 257â†’                }
 258â†’
 259â†’            node.elementType == BINARY_WITH_TYPE ||
 260â†’                node.elementType == SUPER_TYPE_ENTRY ||
 261â†’                node.elementType == TYPE_ARGUMENT_LIST ||
 262â†’                node.elementType == TYPE_PARAMETER_LIST ||
 263â†’                node.elementType == USER_TYPE ->
 264â†’                startIndentContext(node)
 265â†’
 266â†’            node.elementType == DELEGATED_SUPER_TYPE_ENTRY ||
 267â†’                node.elementType == ANNOTATED_EXPRESSION ||
 268â†’                node.elementType == TYPE_REFERENCE ->
 269â†’                startIndentContext(
 270â†’                    fromAstNode = node,
 271â†’                    childIndent = "",
 272â†’                )
 273â†’
 274â†’            node.elementType == IF ->
 275â†’                visitIf(node)
 276â†’
 277â†’            node.elementType == LBRACE ->
 278â†’                visitLbrace(node)
 279â†’
 280â†’            node.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST &&
 281â†’                node.treeParent.elementType != FUNCTION_LITERAL ->
 282â†’                startIndentContext(
 283â†’                    fromAstNode = node,
 284â†’                    lastChildIndent = "",
 285â†’                )
 286â†’
 287â†’            node.elementType == LPAR &&
 288â†’                node.nextCodeSibling()?.elementType == CONDITION ->
 289â†’                visitLparBeforeCondition(node)
 290â†’
 291â†’            node.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER ->
 292â†’                visitValueParameter(node)
 293â†’
 294â†’            node.elementType == FUN ->
 295â†’                visitFun(node)
 296â†’
 297â†’            node.elementType == CLASS ->
 298â†’                visitClass(node)
 299â†’
 300â†’            node.elementType == OBJECT_DECLARATION ->
 301â†’                visitObjectDeclaration(node)
 302â†’
 303â†’            node.elementType == BINARY_EXPRESSION ->
 304â†’                visitBinaryExpression(node)
 305â†’
 306â†’            node.elementType in CHAINABLE_EXPRESSION -> {
 307â†’                if (codeStyle == ktlint_official &&
 308â†’                    node.elementType == DOT_QUALIFIED_EXPRESSION &&
 309â†’                    node.treeParent?.elementType == ARRAY_ACCESS_EXPRESSION &&
 310â†’                    node.treeParent?.treeParent?.elementType == CALL_EXPRESSION
 311â†’                ) {
 312â†’                    // Issue 1540: Deviate and fix from incorrect formatting in IntelliJ IDEA formatting and produce following:
 313â†’                    // val fooBar2 = foo
 314â†’                    //    .bar[0] {
 315â†’                    //        "foobar"
 316â†’                    //    }
 317â†’                    startIndentContext(
 318â†’                        fromAstNode = node.treeParent,
 319â†’                        toAstNode = node.treeParent.treeParent.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 320â†’                    )
 321â†’                } else if (node.prevCodeSibling().isElvisOperator()) {
 322â†’                    startIndentContext(node)
 323â†’                } else if (node.treeParent.elementType in CHAINABLE_EXPRESSION) {
 324â†’                    // Multiple dot qualified expressions and/or safe expression on the same line should not increase the indent level
 325â†’                } else {
 326â†’                    startIndentContext(node)
 327â†’                }
 328â†’            }
 329â†’
 330â†’            node.elementType == IDENTIFIER &&
 331â†’                node.treeParent.elementType == PROPERTY ->
 332â†’                visitIdentifierInProperty(node)
 333â†’
 334â†’            node.elementType == LITERAL_STRING_TEMPLATE_ENTRY &&
 335â†’                node.nextCodeSibling()?.elementType == CLOSING_QUOTE ->
 336â†’                visitWhiteSpaceBeforeClosingQuote(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 337â†’
 338â†’            node.elementType == WHEN ->
 339â†’                visitWhen(node)
 340â†’
 341â†’            node.elementType == WHEN_ENTRY ->
 342â†’                visitWhenEntry(node)
 343â†’
 344â†’            node.elementType == WHERE_KEYWORD &&
 345â†’                node.nextCodeSibling()?.elementType == TYPE_CONSTRAINT_LIST ->
 346â†’                visitWhereKeywordBeforeTypeConstraintList(node)
 347â†’
 348â†’            node.elementType == KDOC ->
 349â†’                visitKdoc(node)
 350â†’
 351â†’            node.elementType == PROPERTY_ACCESSOR ||
 352â†’                node.elementType == TYPEALIAS ->
 353â†’                visitPropertyAccessor(node)
 354â†’
 355â†’            node.elementType == FOR ||
 356â†’                node.elementType == WHILE ->
 357â†’                visitConditionalLoop(node)
 358â†’
 359â†’            node.elementType == LBRACKET ->
 360â†’                visitLBracket(node)
 361â†’
 362â†’            node.elementType == NULLABLE_TYPE ->
 363â†’                visitNullableType(node)
 364â†’
 365â†’            node.elementType == DESTRUCTURING_DECLARATION ->
 366â†’                visitDestructuringDeclaration(node)
 367â†’
 368â†’            node.elementType == TRY ->
 369â†’                visitTryCatchFinally(node)
 370â†’
 371â†’            else -> {
 372â†’                LOGGER.trace { "No processing for ${node.elementType}: ${node.textWithEscapedTabAndNewline()}" }
 373â†’            }
 374â†’        }
 375â†’    }

 377â†’    private fun ASTNode.isPartOfClassWithAMultilinePrimaryConstructor() =
 378â†’        parent { it.elementType == CLASS }
 379â†’            ?.findChildByType(PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR)
 380â†’            ?.textContains('\n') == true
 381â†’
 382â†’    private fun visitValueArgument(node: ASTNode) {
 383â†’        if (codeStyle == ktlint_official) {
 384â†’            // Deviate from standard IntelliJ IDEA formatting to allow formatting below:
 385â†’            //     val foo = foo(
 386â†’            //         parameterName =
 387â†’            //             "The quick brown fox "
 388â†’            //                .plus("jumps ")
 389â†’            //                .plus("over the lazy dog"),
 390â†’            //     )
 391â†’            startIndentContext(
 392â†’                fromAstNode = node,
 393â†’                lastChildIndent = "",
 394â†’            )
 395â†’        }
 396â†’    }

 398â†’    private fun visitSecondaryConstructor(node: ASTNode) {
 399â†’        node
 400â†’            .findChildByType(CONSTRUCTOR_DELEGATION_CALL)
 401â†’            ?.let { constructorDelegationCall ->
 402â†’                val fromAstNode = node.skipLeadingWhitespaceCommentsAndAnnotations()
 403â†’                val nextToAstNode =
 404â†’                    startIndentContext(
 405â†’                        fromAstNode = constructorDelegationCall,
 406â†’                    ).prevCodeLeaf()
 407â†’
 408â†’                // Leading annotations and comments should be indented at same level as constructor itself
 409â†’                if (fromAstNode != node.nextLeaf()) {
 410â†’                    startIndentContext(
 411â†’                        fromAstNode = node,
 412â†’                        toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 413â†’                        childIndent = "",
 414â†’                    )
 415â†’                }
 416â†’            }
 417â†’    }

 419â†’    private fun visitIf(node: ASTNode) {
 420â†’        var nextToAstNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 421â†’        node
 422â†’            .findChildByType(ELSE)
 423â†’            ?.let { fromAstNode ->
 424â†’                nextToAstNode =
 425â†’                    startIndentContext(
 426â†’                        fromAstNode = fromAstNode,
 427â†’                        toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 428â†’                    ).prevCodeLeaf()
 429â†’            }
 430â†’
 431â†’        node
 432â†’            .findChildByType(THEN)
 433â†’            ?.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 434â†’            ?.nextLeaf()
 435â†’            ?.let { nodeAfterThenBlock ->
 436â†’                nextToAstNode =
 437â†’                    startIndentContext(
 438â†’                        fromAstNode = nodeAfterThenBlock,
 439â†’                        toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 440â†’                        childIndent = "",
 441â†’                    ).prevCodeLeaf()
 442â†’            }
 443â†’        node
 444â†’            .findChildByType(RPAR)
 445â†’            ?.nextCodeLeaf()
 446â†’            ?.let { nodeAfterConditionBlock ->
 447â†’                nextToAstNode =
 448â†’                    startIndentContext(
 449â†’                        fromAstNode = nodeAfterConditionBlock,
 450â†’                        toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 451â†’                    ).prevCodeLeaf()
 452â†’            }
 453â†’        startIndentContext(
 454â†’            fromAstNode = node,
 455â†’            toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 456â†’            lastChildIndent = "", // No indent for the RPAR
 457â†’        )
 458â†’    }

 460â†’    private fun visitLbrace(node: ASTNode) {
 461â†’        // Outer indent context
 462â†’        val rbrace =
 463â†’            requireNotNull(
 464â†’                node.nextSibling { it.elementType == RBRACE },
 465â†’            ) { "Can not find matching rbrace" }
 466â†’        startIndentContext(
 467â†’            fromAstNode = node,
 468â†’            toAstNode = rbrace,
 469â†’            firstChildIndent = "",
 470â†’            lastChildIndent = "",
 471â†’        )
 472â†’
 473â†’        // Inner indent context in reversed order
 474â†’        node
 475â†’            .treeParent
 476â†’            ?.takeIf { it.elementType == FUNCTION_LITERAL }
 477â†’            ?.findChildByType(ARROW)
 478â†’            ?.let { arrow ->
 479â†’                startIndentContext(
 480â†’                    fromAstNode = arrow,
 481â†’                    toAstNode = rbrace,
 482â†’                    lastChildIndent = "",
 483â†’                )
 484â†’                startIndentContext(
 485â†’                    fromAstNode = node,
 486â†’                    toAstNode = arrow.prevCodeLeaf()!!,
 487â†’                    childIndent = arrow.calculateIndentOfFunctionLiteralParameters(),
 488â†’                )
 489â†’            }
 490â†’    }

 492â†’    private fun ASTNode.calculateIndentOfFunctionLiteralParameters() =
 493â†’        if (isFirstParameterOfFunctionLiteralPrecededByNewLine()) {
 494â†’            // val fieldExample =
 495â†’            //      LongNameClass {
 496â†’            //              paramA,
 497â†’            //              paramB,
 498â†’            //              paramC ->
 499â†’            //          ClassB(paramA, paramB, paramC)
 500â†’            //      }
 501â†’            indentConfig.indent.repeat(2)
 502â†’        } else {
 503â†’            // Allow default IntelliJ IDEA formatting:
 504â†’            // val fieldExample =
 505â†’            //     LongNameClass { paramA,
 506â†’            //                     paramB,
 507â†’            //                     paramC ->
 508â†’            //         ClassB(paramA, paramB, paramC)
 509â†’            //     }
 510â†’            // val fieldExample =
 511â†’            //     someFunction(
 512â†’            //         1,
 513â†’            //         2,
 514â†’            //     ) { paramA,
 515â†’            //         paramB,
 516â†’            //         paramC ->
 517â†’            //         ClassB(paramA, paramB, paramC)
 518â†’            //     }
 519â†’            this
 520â†’                .takeIf { it.isPartOf(CALL_EXPRESSION) }
 521â†’                ?.treeParent
 522â†’                ?.leaves(false)
 523â†’                ?.takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
 524â†’                ?.sumOf { it.textLength }
 525â†’                ?.plus(2) // need to add spaces to compensate for "{ "
 526â†’                ?.let { length -> " ".repeat(length) }
 527â†’                ?: indentConfig.indent.repeat(2)
 528â†’        }

 530â†’    private fun ASTNode.isFirstParameterOfFunctionLiteralPrecededByNewLine() =
 531â†’        parent(FUNCTION_LITERAL)
 532â†’            ?.findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST)
 533â†’            ?.prevSibling { it.textContains('\n') } != null
 534â†’
 535â†’    private fun visitLparBeforeCondition(node: ASTNode) {
 536â†’        startIndentContext(
 537â†’            fromAstNode = requireNotNull(node.nextLeaf()), // Allow to pickup whitespace before condition
 538â†’            toAstNode = requireNotNull(node.nextCodeSibling()).lastChildLeafOrSelf(), // Ignore whitespace after condition but before rpar
 539â†’            nodeIndent = currentIndent() + indentConfig.indent,
 540â†’            childIndent = "",
 541â†’        )
 542â†’    }
 543â†’
 544â†’    private fun visitValueParameter(node: ASTNode) {
 545â†’        // Inner indent contexts in reversed order
 546â†’        var nextToAstNode: ASTNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 547â†’        node
 548â†’            .findChildByType(EQ)
 549â†’            ?.let { fromAstNode ->
 550â†’                nextToAstNode =
 551â†’                    startIndentContext(
 552â†’                        fromAstNode = fromAstNode,
 553â†’                        toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 554â†’                    ).prevCodeLeaf()
 555â†’            }
 556â†’
 557â†’        if (codeStyle == ktlint_official) {
 558â†’            // Deviate from standard IntelliJ IDEA formatting to allow formatting below:
 559â†’            //     fun process(
 560â†’            //         aVariableWithAVeryLongName:
 561â†’            //             TypeWithAVeryLongNameThatDoesNotFitOnSameLineAsTheVariableName
 562â†’            //     ): List<Output>
 563â†’            node
 564â†’                .findChildByType(COLON)
 565â†’                ?.let { fromAstNode ->
 566â†’                    nextToAstNode =
 567â†’                        startIndentContext(
 568â†’                            fromAstNode = fromAstNode,
 569â†’                            toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 570â†’                        ).prevCodeLeaf()
 571â†’                }
 572â†’        }
 573â†’
 574â†’        // Leading annotations and comments should be indented at same level as constructor itself
 575â†’        val fromAstNode = node.skipLeadingWhitespaceCommentsAndAnnotations()
 576â†’        if (fromAstNode != node.firstChildNode &&
 577â†’            node.prevSibling { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() } == null &&
 578â†’            node == node.treeParent.findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER)
 579â†’        ) {
 580â†’            nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 581â†’                fromAstNode = fromAstNode,
 582â†’                toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 583â†’            ).fromASTNode.prevLeaf { !it.isWhiteSpace() }!!
 584â†’        } else {
 585â†’            startIndentContext(
 586â†’                fromAstNode = node,
 587â†’                toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 588â†’                childIndent = "",
 589â†’            )
 590â†’        }
 591â†’    }
 592â†’
 593â†’    private fun visitFun(node: ASTNode) {
 594â†’        // Inner indent contexts in reversed order
 595â†’        var nextToAstNode: ASTNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 596â†’        val eqOrBlock =

1053â†’    private fun visitNewLineIndentation(
1054â†’        node: ASTNode,
1055â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
1056â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
1057â†’    ) {

1061â†’
1062â†’        val normalizedNodeIndent = node.normalizedIndent(emit)
1063â†’        val expectedIndentation = node.expectedIndent()
1064â†’        val text = node.text
1065â†’        val nodeIndent = text.substringAfterLast("\n")
1066â†’        if (nodeIndent != normalizedNodeIndent || normalizedNodeIndent != expectedIndentation) {
1067â†’            if (normalizedNodeIndent != expectedIndentation) {
1068â†’                emit(
1069â†’                    node.startOffset + text.length - nodeIndent.length,
1070â†’                    "Unexpected indentation (${normalizedNodeIndent.length}) (should be ${expectedIndentation.length})",
1071â†’                    true,
1072â†’                )
1073â†’            } else {
1074â†’                // Indentation was at correct level but contained invalid indent characters. This violation has already
1075â†’                // been emitted.
1076â†’            }
1077â†’            LOGGER.trace {
1078â†’                "Line $line: " + (if (!autoCorrect) "would have " else "") + "changed indentation to ${expectedIndentation.length} " +
1079â†’                    "(from ${normalizedNodeIndent.length}) for ${node.elementType}: ${node.textWithEscapedTabAndNewline()}"
1080â†’            }
1081â†’            if (autoCorrect) {
1082â†’                (node as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(
1083â†’                    text.substringBeforeLast("\n") + "\n" + expectedIndentation,
1084â†’                )
1085â†’            }
1086â†’        } else {
1087â†’            node.processedButNoIndentationChangedNeeded()
1088â†’        }
1089â†’    }

1091â†’    private fun ASTNode.ignoreIndent(): Boolean {
1092â†’        val nextLeaf = nextLeaf()
1093â†’        if (text.endsWith("\n") && nextLeaf.isStartOfRawStringLiteral()) {
1094â†’            processedButNoIndentationChangedNeeded()
1095â†’            return true // raw strings (""") are allowed at column 0
1096â†’        }
1097â†’
1098â†’        nextLeaf
1099â†’            ?.parent(strict = false) { it.psi is PsiComment }
1100â†’            ?.let { comment ->
1101â†’                if (text.endsWith("\n")) {
1102â†’                    processedButNoIndentationChangedNeeded()
1103â†’                    return true // comments are allowed at column 0
1104â†’                }
1105â†’                if (comment.textContains('\n') && comment.elementType == BLOCK_COMMENT) {
1106â†’                    // FIXME: while we cannot assume any kind of layout inside a block comment,
1107â†’                    // `/*` and `*/` can still be indented
1108â†’                    processedButNoIndentationChangedNeeded()
1109â†’                    return true
1110â†’                }
1111â†’            }
1112â†’        return false
1113â†’    }

 87â†’    private fun visitExpression(

123â†’    private fun ASTNode.needToWrapMultilineExpression() =

145â†’    private fun ASTNode.closingParenthesisOfFunctionOrNull() =

150â†’    private fun ASTNode.isLambdaExpression() =
